why_now: 12 of your active auctions close within 48 hours, including 3 golden-age keys above $2,000. This promotion window expires tomorrow — acting now maximises visibility before closing.
why_this: Amazing Fantasy #15 has been in your catalog for 30 days with no promotion. At $4,800, it is your highest-value current listing and the strongest signal for collector attention.
why_channel: Instagram leads with the visual impact this key issue deserves. Email reaches your collector list directly with a private-offer signal. Together they cover both discovery and conversion.
why_works: Featured collectible campaigns in auction houses drive 2–4× higher bid engagement compared to non-promoted listings. Your audience of active collectors expects to see marquee pieces highlighted.

expected_impact.summary: Expected to drive strong bid activity and increase final hammer price on featured items.
expected_impact.reach_estimate: 600–1,000 accounts reached across Instagram and email list
expected_impact.engagement_signal: Comic collectible posts in auction context typically see 3–5% engagement rate vs. 1% average
expected_impact.confidence_basis: Based on active inventory signals and industry auction engagement benchmarks; no prior campaign history for this item
